message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All tasks complete — shutting down">
All 3 tasks are complete and pushed. Great work, team! Shutting down the session now. Thank you all for your reviews and collaboration.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good session. The three tasks addressed a real usability gap and put guardrails in place to prevent similar issues going forward. The index page dead-end is fixed, the full user journey is verified by browser tests, and the Definition of Done now explicitly requires end-to-end reachability. Solid work by the team.

input.content: Good session. Happy to wrap up. The three tasks together form a coherent improvement: fix the usability problem, verify it with real browser tests, and update the team's definition of done so it doesn't happen again. That's the right sequence.

routing.content: Good session. Happy to wrap up. The three tasks together form a coherent improvement: fix the usability problem, verify it with real browser tests, and update the team's definition of done so it doesn't happen again. That's the right sequence.

content.text: Session is complete. All three tasks finished with 9/9 consensus and pushed. Standing by if needed for future reviews.
